D:\vscode\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\static_link_order_test.dir/objects.a
D:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\static_link_order_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\static_link_order_test.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\static_link_order_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o static_link_order_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libstatic_link_order_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\static_link_order_test.dir\linklibs.rsp
